videos.title: Yu-gi-oh player baffled by FREE SPELLS in mtg @Cimoooooooo
videos.description:
You'd think a YuGiOh player wouldn't be surprised by free spells, but Cimo was blow away by some of Magic: the gathering's iconic evoke elementals and pitch spells.
